name: Tails

pricing.details: Free and open source. Runs from a USB drive; does not require installation.

description: Amnesic live operating system that routes all traffic through Tor and leaves no trace on the host computer. Runs from USB. All state is discarded on shutdown unless explicitly persisted.
rationale: Tails provides the strongest anonymity properties of any general-purpose OS in this index. Amnesic design means no forensic evidence persists after use. All internet traffic is forced through Tor. No installation required — runs from USB on any x86-64 machine. Persistent storage can be encrypted and enabled optionally. Best suited for high-risk use cases requiring strong anonymity and deniability. Not practical as a daily-use operating system due to session reset and application availability constraints.
